name: Fudgy Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate with margarine. Stir in sweetened condensed milk, hot water and eggs; mix well. Remove from heat and stir in remaining ingredients. Pour into prepared pie crust. Bake 40 to 45 minutes or until center is set. Cool slightly. Serve warm or chilled. Garnish with whipped cream or ice cream if desired. Refrigerate leftovers.
